data.title: China aims to control global digital asset markets by liquidating confiscated crypto through Hong Kong exchanges, outmaneuvering the US.
data.description: China intends to sell off confiscated cryptocurrency through exchanges in Hong Kong as part of a strategic move to dominate the global digital asset markets and surpass the United States.

data.title: Unlikely Trump tariffs will bridge income disparities and restore US factory jobs as promised.
data.description: The president is targeting his trade policies towards workers who have been negatively affected by globalization. However, it is important to note that implementing trade barriers may not necessarily lead to the revival of factories or a reduction in income disparities.

data.title: Vokka launches Perfume Gift Combos with Rakhi for Raksha Bandhan 2025, luxury scents paired with Rakhis. Celebrate with elegance & fragrance.
data.description: Join in the celebration of Raksha Bandhan with Vokka's exclusive gift sets featuring luxury perfumes matched with handcrafted Rakhis. Combining elegance, fragrance, and sibling love, these limited-edition combos are the perfect way to show your appreciation. Embrace the spirit of the occasion as Vokka introduces this special offering in honor of Raksha Bandhan. Make the most of this unique opportunity to express your affection for your siblings with a thoughtful gift. Available in New Delhi, these sets are a wonderful choice for commemorating the bond between brothers and sisters. Don't miss out on this chance to make Raksha Bandhan truly memorable with Vokka's exquisite gift combos.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway's Q2 earnings drop 3.8% to $11.16 billion due to global pressures and weak insurance performance. CEO Warren Buffett is set to step down by 2025.
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. reported a 3.8% decrease in operating earnings to $11.16 billion in the second quarter due to weak insurance and investment performance. The company faced challenges from global trade tensions and tariffs, with a significant impact from a $3.8 billion loss from its stake in The Kraft Heinz Company. Insurance underwriting profit dropped by 12% to $1.99 billion from $2.26 billion the previous year. This quarter's results are the first since Warren Buffett announced his plan to step down as CEO in 2025, with Greg Abel expected to succeed him. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 80,000 BTC moved after 14 years from dormant wallets, raising concerns about quantum threat to Bitcoin.
data.description: It is believed that a large Bitcoin holder recently transferred 80,000 BTC from inactive wallets following the transmission of concerning OP_RETURN messages through various long-unused addresses.

data.title: Bitcoin may reach $500,000 or even $1 million in 2025, as per optimistic forecasts by industry experts.
data.description: The soaring growth of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has sparked interest not only in the asset itself but also in the various predictions swirling around it. CEO of Bitcoin tech firm JAN3, Samson Mow, firmly believes in a $1 million price target for the leading cryptocurrency. In a recent interview in September 2024, Mow reiterated his conviction that Bitcoin will hit this milestone by 2025, possibly even by the end of 2024. While confident in his projection, Mow carefully chose his words, stating, "You know Bitcoin is going to add a zero. It's simply a matter of when." The originator of the renowned Bitcoin stock-to-flow model, Plan B, forecasted earlier this year that Bitcoin's average price in 2025 would be around $500,000 and could fluctuate between $250,000 and $1 million due to halving events and increasing demand driven by scarcity. Plan B has maintained this outlook since 2022. For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lazlo 326 launches first fully integrated lottery platform with national retailer in U.S., tapping into $100 billion market.
data.description: In Atlanta, Lazlo 326 has introduced a pilot of its innovative lottery sales platform with a major national retailer, becoming the maiden scalable, cloud-native lottery solution to integrate directly into current retail checkout and mobile systems in the U.S. The American lottery industry surpasses $100 billion per year, primarily derived from in-store transactions totaling over $90 billion. Despite this, sales are still connected to outdated systems.

data.title: CIBC Innovation Banking funds Ripple Operations for growth capital, supporting platform modernization in maritime industry.
data.description: CIBC Innovation Banking has disclosed its provision of growth capital financing to Ripple Operations, a prominent Crew Success platform catering to the global maritime sector. The funding will aid in Ripple's continuous platform enhancement and worldwide expansion efforts, which notably include the upcoming Crew Success Summit scheduled for October. Ripple Operations has solidified its position as a significant player in maritime HR and crew management by consolidating four legacy businesses.
Stock markets soar with the S&P 500 reaching record high of 4,300 points amidst frothy investor optimism.

data.title: Inflation hits 2.6% y-o-y in June, exceeding expectations; Core PCE at 2.8%, highest since Feb, signaling end of Trump's inflation lull.
data.description: The period of low inflation that aided President Donald Trump in pressuring the Federal Reserve has ended, with June's data revealing that consumer prices are now being impacted by tariffs. Fed Chair Jerome Powell's decision to stand firm proved wise as the key inflation measure, the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index, rose to 2.6% year-over-year, surpassing May's 2.3% and beating expectations of 2.5%. This marks the highest annual rate since February. Excluding food and energy, the Core PCE remained at 2.8%, unchanged from the revised May figure and exceeding the projected 2.7%. This underscores the presence of persistent underlying inflation. Monthly figures also showed a 0.3% increase in both headline and core inflation, signaling an acceleration.

data.title: Teramount secures $50M in funding led by KDT to boost AI infrastructure optical connectivity production.
data.description: In a recent development, Koch Disruptive Technologies (KDT) has taken the lead in a Series A funding round aimed at speeding up Teramount's shift towards high-volume production. The funding round also saw the participation of major players such as AMD Ventures, Hitachi Ventures, Samsung Catalyst Fund, Wistron, and Grove Ventures, alongside several others. This investment is expected to fuel Teramount's production growth significantly.

data.title: Trump's economic approval ratings are similar to Biden's predecessor, showing a similarity in their economic policies.
data.description: The economic approval ratings of President Donald Trump are beginning to mirror those of the former president.

data.title: 25% odds of 'Zero' Fed rate cuts in 2025 after Powell's conference; uncertainty rises about monetary policy. Fed Chair's hawkish tone impacts markets.
data.description: Following Chair Jerome Powell's recent remarks, the likelihood of the Federal Reserve maintaining steady interest rates throughout 2025 saw a significant increase. The prediction market, Kalshi, revealed a surge in the probability of there being 'Zero' rate cuts in 2025, now standing at 25%. Powell's press conference led to this spike, bringing attention to a potentially hawkish stance by the Fed Chair. Market expectations had previously leaned towards at least two rate cuts. This development adds a layer of uncertainty to the future trajectory of monetary policy. For more information, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Circle Internet, Coinbase, CoreWeave, Nvidia, and Tesla saw significant movement in Dow Jones Futures ahead of Fed's policy meeting.
data.description: Key movers on Monday ahead of the Federal Reserve's policy meeting were Circle Internet, Coinbase, CoreWeave, Nvidia, and Tesla, as reflected by Dow Jones Futures. These companies were instrumental in driving market activity. The article from Investor's Business Daily highlights the impact and significance of Circle Internet, Coinbase, CoreWeave, Nvidia, and Tesla in the recent market movements.
Refresco now owns Telemark Kildevann after completing the acquisition.

data.title: Federal Reserve keeps interest rate at 4.25% to 4.50%, defying pressure from Trump for cuts. Powell's hawkish stance surprises economists. Stocks fall, bond yields rise, dollar strengthens. Fed ready to keep rates elevated if needed.
data.description: The Federal Reserve maintained its benchmark interest rate at 4.25% to 4.50% during the Federal Open Market Committee Meeting, despite pressure from President Trump for rate cuts. Economist Mohamed El-Erian highlighted that market reactions were driven more by the post-meeting press conference than the meeting itself. Fed Chair Jerome Powell's remarks indicated a potentially hawkish outlook on policy rates, causing stocks to fall, bond yields to rise, and the dollar to strengthen. The Fed's reluctance to hint at rate cuts in the next meeting led to mixed market reactions. El-Erian emphasized that market movements were predominantly influenced by Powell's statements in the press conference.

data.title: Despite a 17% drop in Coinbase's stock, analysts remain optimistic as the platform continues to expand its services through acquisitions.
data.description: On Friday, there was a significant 17% decline in Coinbase shares; however, analysts believe that the stock may see an upward trend in the future due to the expansion of the trading platform's services through various acquisitions.

data.title: Google and a gold miner lead stocks nearing buy points after market sell-off. Alphabet shows strong profit growth from AI and other ventures.
data.description: Alphabet, the parent company of Google, continues to excel in profit growth, largely due to the success of artificial intelligence and other expanding ventures. The impressive performance has positioned Alphabet as one of the top performers in the market. Additionally, Google, along with a gold mining company, are among the five stocks showing promise for potential investment opportunities despite the recent market downturn. This news highlights the resilience and success of Alphabet in the current business landscape.

data.title: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. released limited Q2 2025 results, urges reading full report at website for accurate info.
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (BRK.A; BRK.B) released its operating results for the second quarter and first six months of both 2025 and 2024. It is recommended that interested parties refer to the 10-Q report available on the company's website for detailed information. The earnings of Berkshire Hathaway Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries were reported, however, this limited information in the press release may not be sufficient for making investment decisions.
